tiddlers.title: $TestFrameworkPlugin
TestLinks
tiddlers.text:
* <<tests.clear>>
* <<tests.queue name:"Close All Tiddlers" msg:ui.close.all find:[data-tiddler-title] expectNone:1>>
* <<tests.queue name:"Open All Tiddlers" msg:ui.open.all find:[data-tiddler-title] expectSome:"Welcome,Help">>
* <<tests.queue comment:"Done" msg:ui.close.all>>

<<tests.run suite:"Links">>

## To Test 

* Link to search results: [😎Shadows](#msg:search:$tag:$Shadow)
* Open all tagged with `Favorite`: [⭐Favorites](#msg:ui.open.all:{"tag":"Favorite"})
* [Favorite](#msg:ui.open.all:tag:Favorite)

## Code-block escaping (must render literally, no links/macros/inclusions)

Inline code, must stay literal: `[[$StyleSheetCore]]` `<<somemacro>>` `{{SomeTiddler}}`

Fenced block, must stay literal:

```
* [[$StyleSheetCore]]
* <<somemacro>>
* {{SomeTiddler}}
```

And a real link outside code still works: [[$StyleSheetCore]]

tiddlers.title: TestParametersPlugin
TestSearch
tiddlers.text:
* <<tests.clear>>
* <<tests.queue name:"Close All Tiddlers" click:#close-all find:[data-tiddler-title] expectNone:1>>
* <<tests.queue name:"Search Welcome" type:#search input:welcome find:"#search-results [data-params=Welcome]">>
* <<tests.queue name:"Search Advanced 1" type:#search input:"$close pck:icons" find:"#search-results div" expect:"$IconClose">>
* <<tests.queue name:"Search Advanced 2" type:#search input:"$all pck:icons" find:"#search-results div" expect:"$IconOpenAll,$IconCloseAll">>
* <<tests.queue comment:"Done">>

<<tests.run suite:"Search">>
